Package glide.api.models.commands.scan

Class ScanOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.scan.BaseScanOptions
      • glide.api.models.commands.scan.ScanOptions
  • public class ScanOptions
extends BaseScanOptions
    Optional arguments for GenericCommands.scan(java.lang.String) and GenericClusterCommands.scan(glide.api.models.commands.scan.ClusterScanCursor).
    See Also:
    valkey.io
